h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) = (pr1 h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(((((pr1 h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂)) • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁ w₂)
   • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂)
 • (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) = (pr1 h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂ • ((pr1 h₁ ◃ θ₁) ▹ w₂))
   • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂)
 • (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃) = ?t2

• (((pr1 h₁ ◃ θ₁) ▹ w₂)
   • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
      • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
         • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃))))) =
?t2

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) = (pr1 h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(pr1 h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))))) =
lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)
               • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))))

LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit

v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧

q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(pr1 h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))))) =
lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)
               • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))))

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
?b =
lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)
               • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))))

τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(pr1 h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((((pr1 h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
     • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂) • (s₁' ▹ w₂))
   • ((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃) = ?b

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • ((v₁' · pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))))) =
lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)
               • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))))

      
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' · pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂)
• (((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂
      • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))) =
rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
      • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))

LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂) ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ (pr1 h₂) w₂)
 • (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃) = ?t2

LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f

h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f

v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧

τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂

((rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂ • (τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₂ · w₂))
 • (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃) = ?t2

LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f

h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' · pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂)
• (rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂
   • ((v₁' ◃ s₂)
      • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂ · pr1 h₃)
         • lassociator v₁ v₂ (pr1 h₃)))) =
rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
      • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))))

q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂

   • ((v₁' ◃ s₂)
      • (lassociator v₁' v₂ (pr1 h₃)
         • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)))) =

   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃

q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((v₁' · pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂)
  • (v₁' ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ (pr1 h₃))
• ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃) =
(((rassociator v₁' (pr1 h₂) w₂' • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
  • lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃))
 • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)

(v₁' ◃ (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂))
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁' v₂ (pr1 h₃)) =
(v₁' ◃ s₂')
• (lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃)
   • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃))

      
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: ∑ _ : B, unit
h₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 x₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 y₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
h₃: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 z₁, pr1 z₂ ⟧, left_adjoint f
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₁, pr1 y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₁, pr1 z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ pr1 x₂, pr1 y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ pr1 y₂, pr1 z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: pr1 h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · pr1 h₂
s₁': pr1 h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · pr1 h₂
s₂: pr1 h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · pr1 h₃
s₂': pr1 h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · pr1 h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ pr1 h₃) = (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((v₁' ◃ (pr1 h₂ ◃ θ₂)) • (v₁' ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁' v₂ (pr1 h₃) =
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • lassociator v₁' v₂' (pr1 h₃))
• ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ pr1 h₃)

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁
 h₁' : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(k₁
 k₁' : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂
 k₂' : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧)
(τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₁') (τ₂ : h₂ ==> h₂') (θ₁ : k₁ ==> k₁')
(θ₂ : k₂ ==> k₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₁' k₁' v₁ v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat h₂' k₂' v₂ v₃),
is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_hor_cylinder (comp_h_square_bicat s₁ s₂)
      (comp_h_square_bicat s₁' s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)
 
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁, h₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂': mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
∏ (k₂' : mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁0 : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂0 : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧)
(τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₂) (τ₂ : h₃ ==> v₁) (θ₁ : v₁' ==> v₂)
(θ₂ : v₂' ==> k₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ v₁' v₁0 v₂0)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₂ v₂ v₁0 v₂0)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₃ v₂' v₂0 v₃)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat v₁ k₂' v₂0 v₃),
is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_hor_cylinder (comp_h_square_bicat s₁ s₂)
      (comp_h_square_bicat s₁' s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ v₁' w₁' w₂
s₁': square_double_bicat h₂ v₂ w₁' w₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₃ v₂' w₂ w₂'
s₂': square_double_bicat v₁ w₁ w₂ w₂'
p: is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
q: is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
is_hor_cylinder (comp_h_square_bicat s₁ s₂)
  (comp_h_square_bicat s₁' s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁) (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

      
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁, h₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ v₁' w₁' w₂
s₁': square_double_bicat h₂ v₂ w₁' w₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₃ v₂' w₂ w₂'
s₂': square_double_bicat v₁ w₁ w₂ w₂'
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ pr1 θ₁) = (pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂' • (pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))
  • (s₁ ▹ pr1 v₂'))
 • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₁') (pr1 v₂'))
• (w₁' ◃ ((pr1 θ₁ ▹ pr1 v₂') • (pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂))) =
(((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) • (pr1 h₂ ◃ pr1 τ₂)) ▹ w₂')
• ((((rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'
      • (pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator (pr1 h₂) w₂ (pr1 w₁))
    • (s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁))
   • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 w₁))

p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ pr1 θ₁) = (pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂' • (pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))
  • (s₁ ▹ pr1 v₂'))

• ((((rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'
      • (pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂'))

    • (s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁))

((((rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂' • (pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))
  • (s₁ ▹ pr1 v₂'))

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((s₁ • (w₁' ◃ pr1 θ₁)) ▹ pr1 v₂')
• rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂') = ?y'

B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁, h₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: square_double_bicat h₁ v₁' w₁' w₂
s₁': square_double_bicat h₂ v₂ w₁' w₂
s₂: square_double_bicat h₃ v₂' w₂ w₂'
s₂': square_double_bicat v₁ w₁ w₂ w₂'
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ pr1 θ₁) = (pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂'
• ((pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂')
      • (((((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂') • (s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂'))
          • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂'))
         • (w₁' ◃ (pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂))))) =
((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((pr1 h₂ ◃ pr1 τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'
      • ((pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator (pr1 h₂) w₂ (pr1 w₁)
            • ((s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁)
               • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 w₁))))))

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂'
• ((pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂')
      • (((((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂') • (s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂'))
          • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂'))
         • (w₁' ◃ (pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂))))) =
((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((pr1 h₂ ◃ pr1 τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'
      • ((pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂')

            • ((s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁)

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂'
• ((pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂)

      • (((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂')
         • ((s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂')
            • (rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂')
               • (w₁' ◃ (pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂))))))) =

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂'
• ((pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂')
      • (((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂')
         • ((s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂')
            • ((w₁' · pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂)
               • rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 w₁)))))) =
((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) ▹ w₂')

   • (rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'

s₂': square_double_bicat v₁ w₁ w₂ w₂'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(((((rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂' • (pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂))
    • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))
   • ((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂')) • (s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂'))
 • (w₁' · pr1 v₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂))
• rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 w₁) =
(((((((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) ▹ w₂')
     • ((pr1 h₂ ◃ pr1 τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
    • rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂')
   • (pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂'))
  • lassociator (pr1 h₂) w₂ (pr1 w₁)) • (s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁))
• rassociator w₁' (pr1 v₂) (pr1 w₁)

   • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))
  • ((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂')) • (s₁' ▹ pr1 v₂'))

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂'
• ((pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂')
      • (((pr1 τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ pr1 v₂')
         • ((pr1 h₂ · w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) • (s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁))))) =
((pr1 τ₁ ▹ pr1 h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((pr1 h₂ ◃ pr1 τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator (pr1 h₂) (pr1 v₁) w₂'
      • ((pr1 h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator (pr1 h₂) w₂ (pr1 w₁)
            • (s₁' ▹ pr1 w₁)))))

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ pr1 θ₂) = (pr1 τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₃) w₂' • (pr1 h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator (pr1 h₁) w₂ (pr1 v₂'))

 exact mate_double_bicat_cylinder_laws.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
isaset_square_double_bicat_law
  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
w, x, y, z: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x, z ⟧
isaset (square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂)

      apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

double_bicat_laws ?B

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
double_bicat_laws mate_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact mate_double_bicat_laws.
  Defined.

x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq vertical_cell_to_square

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂
→ v₁ ==> v₂
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : v₁ ==> v₂, ?g (vertical_cell_to_square x0) = x0
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
vertical_cell_to_square (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂
→ v₁ ==> v₂
 exact (λ τ, linvunitor _ • τ • runitor _).
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : v₁ ==> v₂,
(λ τ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
 (linvunitor v₂ • τ) • runitor v₁)
  (vertical_cell_to_square x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         apply id2_left).
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
vertical_cell_to_square
  ((λ τ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
    (linvunitor v₂ • τ) • runitor v₁) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite rwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite <- rinvunitor_natural ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         apply id2_left).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
horizontally_saturated mate_verity_double_bicat

x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
horizontal_cell_to_square (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y)
→ h₁ ==> h₂
 exact (λ τ, rinvunitor _ • τ • lunitor _ ,, tt).
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : h₁ ==> h₂,
(λ τ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
 ((rinvunitor (pr1 h₁) • τ) • lunitor (pr1 h₂)),, tt)
  (horizontal_cell_to_square x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropunit | ] ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         apply id2_left).
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
horizontal_cell_to_square
  ((λ τ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
    ((rinvunitor (pr1 h₁) • τ) • lunitor (pr1 h₂)),,
    tt) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
         apply id2_left).
  Defined.

f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∑
v : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
      mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧,
are_companions f v

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
are_companions f (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y) ==> pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y)
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f ==> id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id_h (pr1 x) ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 f))
• (((((lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
         (id_h (pr1 y)) • (?Goal0 ▹ id_h (pr1 y)))
      • rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
          (id_h (pr1 y))) • (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ ?Goal))
    • lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
        (id_h (pr1 y)))
   • (lunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y))) =
lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y))
 • ((((rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
         (id_h (pr1 y)) • (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ ?Goal))
      • lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
          (id_h (pr1 y))) • (?Goal0 ▹ id_h (pr1 y)))
    • rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
        (id_h (pr1 y))))
• (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ runitor (pr1 f)) =
runitor (pr1 f) • linvunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y) ==> pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y)
 apply id2.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f ==> id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f
 apply id2.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id_h (pr1 x) ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 f))
• (((((lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
         (id_h (pr1 y))
       • (id₂ (id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y)))
      • rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
          (id_h (pr1 y)))
     • (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ id₂ (pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y))))
    • lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
        (id_h (pr1 y)))
   • (lunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y))) =
lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2, !id2_right ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
x, y: mate_verity_double_bicat
f: mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y))
 • ((((rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
         (id_h (pr1 y))
       • (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ id₂ (pr1 f · id_h (pr1 y))))
      • lassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
          (id_h (pr1 y)))
     • (id₂ (id_h (pr1 x) · pr1 f) ▹ id_h (pr1 y)))
    • rassociator (id_h (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
        (id_h (pr1 y))))
• (id_h (pr1 x) ◃ runitor (pr1 f)) =
runitor (pr1 f) • linvunitor (pr1 f)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2, !id2_right ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

f ==> g

is_invertible_2cell ?η

f ==> g
 exact τ^-1.

 exact τ.

 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_rinv τ)).

f, g: B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧

τ • τ ^-1 = id₂ g
 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_linv τ)).

  (mate_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intro τ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (** * 8. The local univalence of the Verity double bicategory of mates *)
  
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent mate_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent mate_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (idtoiso_2_1 f g)

    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
?w ~ idtoiso_2_1 f g

  mate_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
 exact (mate_verity_double_ver_inv2cell_weq _ _
             ∘ make_weq _ (HB_2_1 _ _ _ _))%weq.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(mate_verity_double_ver_inv2cell_weq f g
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_1 f g)
     (HB_2_1 (pr1 x) (pr1 y) f g))%weq ~
idtoiso_2_1 f g
 abstract
        (intro p ;
         induction p ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (** * 10. The global univalence of the Verity double bicategory of mates *)
  
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent mate_verity_double_bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent mate_verity_double_bicat

HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
isweq (idtoiso_2_0 x y)

LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

  mate_verity_double_bicat
x = y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y

  mate_verity_double_bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
isaprop
  (Core.ob_disp
     (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
        (left_adj_disp_bicat B)) (pr1 y))

      apply isapropunit.
    
B: bicat
LB:= left_adj_bicat B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  mate_verity_double_bicat
(mate_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x y
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
     (HB_2_0 (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop
     (Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           (left_adj_disp_bicat B))) x y isapropunit)%weq ~
idtoiso_2_0 x y

p: x = y
(mate_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x y
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
     (HB_2_0 (pr1 x) (pr1 y))
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop
     (Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           (left_adj_disp_bicat B))) x y isapropunit)%weq
  p = idtoiso_2_0 x y p

pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.
